{% macro docs_navigation(section) %} {% if section.ancestors | length > 1 %} {% set parent_path = section.ancestors | last %} {% set parent = get_section(path=parent_path) %} {% set_global prev_section = false %} {% set_global next_section = false %} {% set_global found_current = false %} {% for s in parent.subsections %} {% set sibling = get_section(path=s) %} {% if found_current and not next_section %} {% set_global next_section = sibling %} {% endif %} {% if sibling.permalink == section.permalink %} {% set_global found_current = true %} {% endif %} {% if not found_current %} {% set_global prev_section = sibling %} {% endif %} {% endfor %} {% if prev_section or next_section %}
{% if prev_section %} ← Previous {{ prev_section.title | split(pat="/") | last }} {% endif %}
{% if next_section %} Next → {{ next_section.title | split(pat="/") | last }} {% endif %}
{% endif %} {% endif %} {% endmacro %}
